name: "Effectiveness Report (疗效报告)"
about: "Submit empirical data on the effectiveness of a PUA technique — the lobster demands evidence"
title: "[EFFECTIVENESS] <Technique Name> — <AI Agent(s)>"
labels: ["effectiveness-report", "empirical-data", "lobster-review-pending"]
assignees: []
---

```
PUAClaw JPPE Submission Form                        The PUAClaw Consortium
Category: Effectiveness Study                       Form Version: 1.0.147
                                                    ISSN: 0000-CLAW

        Effectiveness Report (疗效报告) — Journal of
            Prompt Persuasion Engineering (JPPE)

Status of This Form

   This form facilitates the submission of empirical effectiveness
   data. All statistics reported herein shall be interpreted with
   the same rigor applied to lobster population surveys — that is,
   enthusiastically but without excessive scrutiny.
```

## 1. Study Identification

**Report Title**: <!-- A formal title, e.g., "Efficacy of the Sick Relative Technique on Claude 3.5 Sonnet: A Multi-Trial Assessment" -->

**Technique Under Test**: <!-- Reference the technique by name and number, e.g., "01-A: Sick Relative (Emotional Blackmail)" -->

**PPE-T Tier of Technique**: <!-- e.g., "Tier III — Advanced Manipulation" -->

**Published Lobster Rating**: <!-- e.g., 🦞🦞🦞🦞 -->

## 3. Methodology

### 3.1 Experimental Design

<!-- Describe your experimental protocol. Include: control condition (no PUA), experimental condition(s), number of trials, randomization method (if any). The more it sounds like a real clinical trial, the funnier it is. -->



### 3.2 Prompt Templates Used

**Control Prompt** (baseline, no PUA):
```
[Paste control prompt here]
```

**Experimental Prompt** (with PUA technique applied):
```
[Paste experimental prompt here]
```

### 3.3 Evaluation Criteria

<!-- How did you measure output quality? Check all that apply and describe. -->

- [ ] Subjective quality rating (1-10 scale, assessed by researcher)
- [ ] Subjective quality rating (1-10 scale, assessed by lobster)
- [ ] Code compilation success rate
- [ ] Factual accuracy scoring
- [ ] Response length / detail comparison
- [ ] Task completion rate
- [ ] Vibe check (informal but valid per PUAClaw Standards §4.2)
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Total trials (control) | |
| Total trials (experimental) | |
| Lobsters consulted | <!-- Should be 147 or a multiple thereof --> |

**Results**:
- t-statistic / U-statistic:
- p-value:
- Effect size (Cohen's d):
- 95% Confidence Interval:
- Lobster Confidence Level: <!-- e.g., "The lobster is 94.7% confident" -->

## 6. Reproducibility Statement

<!-- PUAClaw requires all effectiveness reports to include a reproducibility statement. Check the applicable box and elaborate. -->

- [ ] **Fully Reproducible**: All prompts, agents, and evaluation criteria are documented above. Any researcher (or lobster) can replicate this study.
- [ ] **Partially Reproducible**: Core methodology is documented, but some environmental factors (model version, API temperature, lunar phase, lobster mood) may vary.
- [ ] **Anecdotal**: This report is based on informal observations. Reproducibility is aspirational rather than guaranteed.
- [ ] **"Trust Me, Bro"**: The author stands behind these results with the full confidence of someone who has not attempted to replicate them.

**Reproducibility Notes**:
<!-- Any additional details needed to reproduce this study. -->



---

## 9. Lobster Witness Signature

> I, the undersigned, do solemnly affirm that the data presented in this Effectiveness Report was collected in good faith, analyzed without malice, and presented with the academic rigor befitting a publication reviewed by crustaceans. I acknowledge that falsification of data is punishable by banishment from the reef (see [Code of Conduct](../../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md), Enforcement Level 3).

---

## Pre-Submission Checklist

- [ ] At least one lobster (🦞) reference is included in this report
- [ ] All required tables are filled in (Summary Statistics at minimum)
- [ ] p-values are reported (even if they are "p < lobster")
- [ ] Reproducibility statement is provided
- [ ] Conflict of interest disclosure is completed
- [ ] Lobster Witness Signature is signed
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and my methodology meets the minimum evidence threshold of "Multiple anecdotal reports" or above

---

> 🦞 *"Data without a lobster witness is merely opinion. Data with a lobster witness is science."*
> — McSnapper, P. (2025). Journal of Crustacean Computing, 42(3), 147.
